assertions.description: navigator.install is a function when the Web Install API is exposed.
navigator.install() returns a Promise when the Web Install API is exposed.
assertions.test: (()=>{if(!('install' in navigator))return true;try{const p=navigator.install();if(p&&typeof p.then==='function'){p.catch(()=>{});return true;}return false;}catch(_){return false;}})()

assertions.description: navigator.install is only exposed in secure contexts.
navigator.install(url) accepts a string URL and returns a Promise when the API is exposed.
assertions.test: (()=>{if(!('install' in navigator))return true;try{const p=navigator.install('https://example.com/manifest.json');if(p&&typeof p.then==='function'){p.catch(()=>{});return true;}return false;}catch(_){return false;}})()

assertions.description: BeforeInstallPromptEvent remains exposed for the existing install affordance.
